tool.video.auto_split.info:
How it works:
• Splits the video into N equal segments
• Keyframe mode snaps to the nearest keyframe for fast stream copy
• Output files are named: originalName_part01, _part02, ...
• Keyframe mode is recommended for the best performance

tool.router.title: AI Console
tool.prompts.title: AI Prompts
tool.router.tts_intro: TTS doesn't route. Pick an engine + voice at the use site (text2video, dialogue tools, etc.). This tab manages connection state, voice catalog freshness, and lets you browse what voices each engine offers.
tool.router.tts_catalog_empty: voice catalog not fetched yet — click Refresh
tool.router.fish_import_title: Import marked Fish Audio voice IDs
tool.router.fish_import_hint: Fish Audio's v1 API doesn't expose a "my marks" endpoint, so paste the voice IDs you've marked on fish.audio one per line (commas / whitespace also work; # starts a comment). On save, each ID is fetched via /model/{id} and merged into the catalog alongside your own-created voices.
tool.router.tts_aistack_hint: ⓘ Gateway connection (URL/enable/test) is configured in the aistack tab; this card only owns the voice catalog.
tool.router.embedded_intro: Bundled with VideoCraft: 🏠 Local embedded (LlamaCpp / faster-whisper — download models via Local Model Manager first) + 🌐 Free online (Microsoft Edge TTS — needs internet, no key).
tool.router.cloud_intro: Sign up on the provider's site and paste an API key. Highest quality and reliability; usage-billed.
tool.router.aistack_intro: aistack is a separate local/remote AI service (github.com/dosmoon/aistack). This tab only owns connection state: URL, enable, test. Per-task models are picked in the Provider Routing tab.
tool.router.prompts_prompt: Prompts are managed centrally here. Pick a task on the left and edit its template on the right. Each task has one prompt — modified ones are marked ●. 'Save' writes to prompts/<task>.md; 'Reset' restores the bundled default.
tool.router.reset_prompt_confirm_msg: Reset the '{name}' prompt to the built-in default? This overwrites your current edits.
tool.router.routing_prompt: Pick one tier per task: Embedded (zero-config, offline) / Cloud (best quality, API key needed) / aistack (self-hosted gateway). LLM tasks add Auto for priority-based fallback. Manage models / keys in the Embedded, Cloud, and aistack tabs.
tool.router.tier_auto_hint: (candidate-pool fallback by priority; skips entries without a key; useful once cloud keys are configured)
tool.router.tier_aistack_disabled_hint: (enable + test the gateway in the aistack tab, then models will show up here)
tool.router.tier_aistack_no_model: (gateway exposes no model for this capability)
tool.router.tier_no_model_installed: (no installed model — download via Local Model Manager)
tool.router.section_local_help: Bundled into the VideoCraft process. No config, no network. Models live under <models>/ on disk; download/remove via Local Model Manager.
tool.router.section_free_online_help: Free third-party online services. No signup, no key, but require internet.
tool.router.section_cloud_help: Sign up on the provider's site and paste an API key. Highest quality and reliability.
tool.router.gateway_enable_label: Wire into routing (when off, aistack is hidden from the routing table)
tool.router.gateway_help: The gateway pane only owns connection state: URL, enable, test. Per-task models are picked in the routing table above. Test hits /v1/models and buckets results by capability so the routing-table model dropdowns can use them.
tool.router.gateway_url_empty: Enter the aistack URL first (default http://127.0.0.1:11500)
tool.router.test_unsupported_for_categor: Quick test for ASR / TTS needs sample input (audio / voice id); slated for the next phase.
tool.router.local_provider_hint: Local service — no API key required. Make sure the aistack gateway is running (default port 11500).
tool.router.local_provider_hint_llama_cp: Local embedded LLM — no API key, no services to start. Drop .gguf files into <models>/llama/, then click Pick Models to choose. Use Menu → AI → Local Model Manager to download Qwen3-1.7B-Q4_K_M.gguf.
tool.router.edge_tts_hint: Microsoft Edge Read-Aloud online TTS, free + no key, news-grade Chinese/English (XiaoxiaoNeural/YunxiNeural are the same models as Azure Neural). Internet required. Dropdown lists popular voices; type any other Edge voice short name (e.g. zh-CN-XiaohanNeural) directly to use it.
tool.router.local_asr_hint: Local faster-whisper (CTranslate2) inference. The model is picked in the Provider Routing tab's Speech-to-text row (small / large-v3-turbo / etc., from installed model dirs); this dialog only carries global runtime knobs — device, compute precision, word-level timestamps.
tool.router.health_fail: Local service not reachable. Make sure the aistack gateway is running (`docker compose up -d` or host process) and at least one model is registered.
tool.router.picker_manual_placeholder: Enter model id and press Enter or click Add
tool.router.refresh_models_ok: ✅ Got {count} models — click Save to persist
tool.router.refresh_unsupported: This provider type does not support remote model listing
tool.router.error_no_base_url: Base URL must not be empty
tool.router.claudecode_hint: Requires the Claude Code CLI installed and logged in (`claude login`). No API key needed.
tool.router.asr_retry_hint: Retries only apply to network errors (connect timeout/read timeout/connection reset). HTTP parameter errors are not retried.
tool.router.error_key_empty: API Key must not be empty

tool.concat_workbench.hint_need_two: ⚠ Need at least 2 input files to concatenate.
tool.concat_workbench.hint_mismatch_stre: ⚠ Format mismatch in row(s) {rows}. Switch to Re-encode mode, or make the inputs consistent.
tool.concat_workbench.hint_mismatch_reen: ⚠ Format mismatch in row(s) {rows} — will be normalized to the target spec during re-encode.
tool.concat_workbench.log.no_output: ⚠ Set an output file path first.
ui.ai_error.hint.network: DNS, TCP, or TLS issue. Check your internet, VPN, or proxy. Retry usually helps.
ui.ai_error.hint.auth: The API key is invalid, expired, or lacks access. Open the AI Console to update it.
ui.ai_error.hint.quota: Your daily / monthly quota is used up. Wait until reset, or switch to a different provider in the AI Console.
ui.ai_error.hint.rate_limit: Too many requests in a short window. Wait briefly and retry.
ui.ai_error.hint.refused: The model's safety filter blocked this request. Edit the prompt in the AI Console's Prompts tab.
ui.ai_error.hint.malformed: The model's response didn't match the expected schema. Retrying often fixes it; if persistent, the model may need to change.
ui.ai_error.hint.overflow: Input exceeds the model's context window. Shorten the input, or switch to a larger-context model in the AI Console.
ui.ai_error.hint.unknown: An unrecognized error. The original message above may help diagnose it.
ui.ai_error.retry_after_hint: Provider suggests waiting {seconds} seconds before retrying.

hub.about.title: About VideoCraft
hub.about.body:
VideoCraft
Video production toolkit

Flow: download → speech-to-text → translate → burn

dialog.disclaimer.title: About Video Link Processing
dialog.disclaimer.heading: About Video Link Processing
dialog.disclaimer.body:
VideoCraft uses yt-dlp to process the video link you provide.
Please confirm you have legal rights to use the content
(own recording / authorized / public domain / fair use).
Download and subsequent-use copyright responsibilities are yours.

This prompt appears once; the full statement is available in the About window.

source_preview.manual_hint: These 5 anchor fields are ground truth — AI Fill preserves what you typed here as its seed. Fill what you know BEFORE running AI generation.
dialog.basic_info.title: AI hint (basic_info)
dialog.basic_info.heading: AI hint (may be inaccurate — AI will verify)
dialog.basic_info.hint: Five hint fields for AI. Spelling errors / approximate dates are fine — AI will search and emit the canonical form into context.json. Downstream renders (name plate / date stamp / chapters) use AI's corrected values.
dialog.source_context.title: Content Context
dialog.source_context.heading: Source Video Content Context
dialog.source_context.hint: Context is fed to AI (chapters/titles/hotclips) to produce on-target outputs. All fields optional.
clip_tool.status_no_hotclips: No hotclips yet. Generate them via the [+] menu on a subtitle row.
clip_tool.warn_no_selection: Please select at least one clip to render.
clip_tool.info_builtin_protected: Built-in presets can't be modified or deleted.
clip_tool.tab1_note_per_clip_content: This style applies to all clips. Per-clip content (hook / subtitles) varies automatically; switch to the Clips / Adjust tab to tweak a specific clip.
clip_tool.confirm_apply_crop_to_all: Apply the current global crop to all clips? This will wipe any per-clip crop overrides.
clip_tool.detail_no_selection:
Click any candidate on the left to view and adjust here.
The checkbox controls whether the clip is rendered.
clip_tool.confirm_restore_ai_text: Discard your text overrides on this clip and restore the AI defaults?
clip_tool.conflict_body_fmt: {n} target file(s) already exist. What do you want to do?
clip_tool.done_with_warning: Some clips failed — see the list
hotclip.field.title: Title
chapter_editor.cant_delete_first: First chapter (00:00) cannot be deleted manually
tool.news_desk.title: News Desk Workbench — {instance}
tool.news_desk.project.title: {type} — {instance}
tool.news_desk.source.label: Source
tool.news_desk.kind.subtitle: Subtitle
tool.news_desk.add.subtitle: Subtitle
tool.news_desk.list.col.name: Name
tool.news_desk.field.name: Name
tool.news_desk.subtitle.legacy_ref: ⚠ upstream reference: {path} · {count} cues · {dur} (click import to localize)
tool.news_desk.chapter.import_what_body: Under each translated subtitle in the left sidebar there's a 📑 “Titles & Chapters” item — that's where AI splits the whole video into chapters. Each chapter carries: start/end times, title, summary (≤128 chars, shown as the start-card body), and key points (3-5 bullets).
tool.news_desk.chapter.import_where_body:
In the left sidebar's “Project” or “Resources” tab: expand Subtitles → pick a translated subtitle (e.g. zh.srt) → the 📑 “Titles & Chapters” underneath is it. If you've already run AI on it, the backing data file is here:
{path}
tool.news_desk.chapter.import_found_body:
Found {n} usable file(s): {files}
(When multiple, the first by alphabetical order is used.)
tool.news_desk.chapter.import_found_none: This project doesn't have any “Titles & Chapters” output yet. Open the left sidebar, expand Subtitles, pick a translated subtitle, click 📑 “Titles & Chapters” to run AI on it first.
tool.news_desk.chapter.import_effect_fre: Fill the list above with all chapters from that file (list is currently empty — safe).
tool.news_desk.chapter.import_effect_ove: ⚠ You already have {n} chapter(s) above (possibly hand-added or edited). Import will wipe them and replace with the AI output. All deleted chapters and edited titles / summaries / key points will be lost. This cannot be undone — cancel first and back up if needed.
tool.news_desk.chapter.confirm_delete: Delete {n} selected chapter(s)? This cannot be undone.
tool.news_desk.chapter.detail_placeholde: Select a chapter above to view / edit its details.
tool.news_desk.chapter.field.title: Title
tool.news_desk.chapter.field.refined: Refined — body of the start card
tool.news_desk.props.empty: No component selected. Pick one on the left to edit its properties.
tool.news_desk.props.no_selection_hint: Select a component on the left to edit its properties.
tool.news_desk.derive.no_date: Fill in basic_info.event_date on the Source pane first.
tool.news_desk.derive.no_basic: Fill in basic_info (host / bio / ...) on the Source pane first.
tool.news_desk.derive.no_chapters: No analysis.json under project subtitles/. Generate it first.
tool.news_desk.field.title: Title
tool.news_desk.field.subtitle: Subtitle
tool.news_desk.error.duration: Failed to probe source video duration.
tool.news_desk.export_dialog.title: Export options
tool.news_desk.export_dialog.intro: Pick the extra deliverables to produce alongside the main video. Optional items log a warning on failure and don't block the main export.
chapter_editor.add_duplicate: A chapter already exists at this timestamp
